news-korea-econ.title: May Day protests across Europe and Asia turn into anti-American, anti-Israel political battlegrounds
news-korea-econ.description: May Day demonstrations across multiple continents escalated into clashes as traditional labor protests increasingly became vehicles for anti-war and anti-Israel political movements.

news-korea-econ.title: North Korea's extreme battlefield doctrine revealed by Kim Jong Un during speech
news-korea-econ.description: Kim Jong Un publicly praised North Korean soldiers who chose self-destruction over capture in Ukraine War, marking a stark confirmation of battlefield policy.

news-global-econ.description: The rupee has declined more than 5% so far this year, ranking as Asia’s worst performer, while the benchmark Nifty 50 stock index has lost 8%

news-global-econ.title: Federal appeals court blocks mailing of abortion pills in ruling with nationwide effect
news-global-econ.description: A federal appeals court blocks mifepristone mail distribution nationwide, ending pandemic-era rules and likely sending the abortion pill fight to the Supreme Court.

news-korea-soc.description: The world is heading toward what could become the largest energy crisis in modern history, with oil shortages potentially forcing demand rationing within weeks, according to Eric Nuttall.

news-global-soc.description: Olympic bronze medalist Alysha Newman has been banned for 20 months after missed drug tests, though investigators accepted she had ended her career.
